subject: new (west) power trader or mid-marketer _ greg wolfe

emails.subject: Re: New (West) Power Trader or Mid-Marketer _ Greg Wolfe
emails.subject_base: New (West) Power Trader or Mid-Marketer _ Greg Wolfe
emails.body: It might be worth it to add Long Term California to Greg's trader ID profile if it's not too much trouble. He said it was unlikely he'd use it, but there's always the potential. No rush, of course. And thanks again for your help. Kate Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Samuel Schott 03/16/2001 04:00 PM
